headline: Robinhood opens platform to AI agents for trading, credit card purchases
summary: Robinhood will allow customers to deploy AI agents to trade stocks on its platform and make purchases ‌on its credit card, the company said on Wednesday.  The company ‌said its users will be able to create a dedicated trading account, separate from their primary ​one, and have their AI agents trade on their behalf.  • AI agents are digital assistants that go beyond chatbot-style prompt responses by autonomously planning and making their own decisions.

raw.headline: Robinhood opens platform to AI agents for trading, credit card purchases
raw.summary: Robinhood will allow customers to deploy AI agents to trade stocks on its platform and make purchases ‌on its credit card, the company said on Wednesday.  The company ‌said its users will be able to create a dedicated trading account, separate from their primary ​one, and have their AI agents trade on their behalf.  • AI agents are digital assistants that go beyond chatbot-style prompt responses by autonomously planning and making their own decisions.
